definitions: a hard, fine-grained metamorphic rock used for sculpture and building

examples.text: a famous marble column carved with the coat of arms of France
examples.explanation: marble: a type of stone used in architecture

reviewSessions.example_text: a famous marble column carved with the coat of arms of France
expected_definitions: a hard, fine-grained metamorphic rock used for sculpture and building
reviewSessions.user_answer: 不记得。并且我不认识旁边的 carve 单词是什么意思
reviewSessions.feedback: 未作答词义；可补记为“大理石”。例句里的 carve 是“雕刻”。
missing_points: 是一种坚硬、细密的变质岩
